LanguageData.Ammo_Magmagat_Buck_Punched.label: Magmus Operandi shell (Buck)
LanguageData.Ammo_Magmagat_Buck_Punched.description: Extremely flamable, burning everything in it's wake.
LanguageData.Ammo_Magmagat_Slug_Punched.label: Magmus Operandi shell (Slug)
LanguageData.Ammo_Magmagat_Slug_Punched.description: Extremely flamable, burning everything in it's wake.
LanguageData.Bullet_Magmagat_Buck_Punched.label: buckshot pellet
LanguageData.Bullet_Magmagat_Slug_Punched.label: Slug shot
